Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('op_seller.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
tables = [r[0] for r in cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\).fetchall\(\)]
for t in tables:
    cur.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM [{t}]'\)
    count = cur.fetchone\(\)[0]
    cur.execute\(f'PRAGMA table_info\([{t}]\)'\)
    cols = [\(r[1], r[2]\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]
    print\(f'=== {t} \({count:,} rows\) ==='\)
    for c in cols:
        print\(f'  {c[0]}: {c[1]}'\)
    print\(\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('D:/op-seller/op_seller.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)

print\('=== 8. EMPTY TABLES ASSESSMENT ==='\)

tables = ['daily_listing_summaries', 'portfolio_slots', 'trade_actions', 'trade_records', 'health_checks']
for t in tables:
    cur.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM {t}'\)
    r = cur.fetchone\(\)
    print\(f'{t}: {r[0]} rows'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== health_checks detail ==='\)
cur.execute\('SELECT MIN\(checked_at\), MAX\(checked_at\), COUNT\(*\) FROM health_checks'\)
r = cur.fetchone\(\)
print\(f'Range: {r[0]} to {r[1]}, count={r[2]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== players table columns ==='\)
cur.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(players\)'\)
cols = [row[1] for row in cur.fetchall\(\)]
print\(f'players columns: {cols}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== listing_count distribution ==='\)
cur.execute\('''SELECT
    SUM\(CASE WHEN listing_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as zero,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN listing_count BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as one_to_ten,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN listing_count BETWEEN 11 AND 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as eleven_to_fifty,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN listing_count > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as over_fifty,
    MIN\(listing_count\), MAX\(listing_count\), AVG\(listing_count\)
FROM players'''\)
r = cur.fetchone\(\)
print\(f'listing_count: zero={r[0]}, 1-10={r[1]}, 11-50={r[2]}, 50+={r[3]}'\)
print\(f'listing_count range: min={r[4]}, max={r[5]}, avg={r[6]:.1f}'\)

cur.execute\('SELECT scan_tier, COUNT\(*\) FROM players GROUP BY scan_tier'\)
rows = cur.fetchall\(\)
print\(f'scan_tier distribution: {dict\(rows\)}'\)

cur.execute\('SELECT is_active, COUNT\(*\) FROM players GROUP BY is_active'\)
rows = cur.fetchall\(\)
print\(f'is_active distribution: {dict\(rows\)}'\)

conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import text
from src.server.db import create_engine

async def main\(\):
    engine = create_engine\(\)
    async with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT * FROM players WHERE ea_id = 84164034'\)\)
        cols = list\(r.keys\(\)\)
        row = r.fetchone\(\)
        if row:
            for c, v in zip\(cols, row\):
                print\(f'{c}: {v}'\)
        else:
            print\('Not found'\)
        
        print\('\\n--- player_scores ---'\)
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT * FROM player_scores WHERE ea_id = 84164034'\)\)
        cols = list\(r.keys\(\)\)
        row = r.fetchone\(\)
        if row:
            for c, v in zip\(cols, row\):
                print\(f'{c}: {v}'\)
        else:
            print\('No score'\)
            
        print\('\\n--- recent snapshots ---'\)
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT scanned_at, lowest_bin, num_auctions FROM market_snapshots WHERE ea_id = 84164034 ORDER BY scanned_at DESC LIMIT 5'\)\)
        for row in r.fetchall\(\):
            print\(row\)
            
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import text
from src.server.db import create_engine
async def main\(\):
    engine = create_engine\(\)
    async with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT MAX\(first_seen_at\) FROM listing_observations'\)\)
        print\('Latest obs:', r.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT MAX\(resolved_at\) FROM listing_observations WHERE outcome IS NOT NULL'\)\)
        print\('Latest resolved:', r.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import text
from src.server.db import create_engine
async def main\(\):
    engine = create_engine\(\)
    async with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT ea_id\) FROM market_snapshots WHERE captured_at >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL \\'10 minutes\\''\)\)
        print\(f'Unique players scanned in last 10 min: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT ea_id\) FROM market_snapshots WHERE captured_at >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL \\'5 minutes\\''\)\)
        print\(f'Unique players scanned in last 5 min: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
        r = await conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT ea_id\) FROM market_snapshots WHERE captured_at >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL \\'1 minute\\''\)\)
        print\(f'Unique players scanned in last 1 min: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
